title: p682
description: 682 has breached containment, this mod adds scp 682.
body:
adds the hard to destroy reptile, if not killed fast enough he will grow stronger and stronger unless contained with the proper procedure.

the mixture is a new liquid added by this mod that keeps this creature under control for as long as it's withing a chamber.

a chamber blueprint can be found as 682 spawning structure.

 

good luck to everyone and stay away unless you know how to deal with 682, do not face him with regular gear he is called the hard to destroy reptile for a reason.
